title: SVG to PNG Extension
description: Settings for SVG graphics PNG export

targetDPI.title: Target DPI
targetDPI.description: Resolution for exported PNG images (dots per inch). Higher values produce larger, higher-quality images suitable for printing. Standard values: 96 (screen), 150 (draft print), 300 (standard print), 600 (high-quality print), 1200 (professional print).

backgroundColor.title: Background Color
backgroundColor.description: Background color for exported PNG images. Select 'custom' to specify a hex color.

customBackgroundColor.title: Custom Background Color
customBackgroundColor.description: Hex color code for custom background (e.g., #ff0000 for red). Only used when Background Color is set to 'custom'.

exportThemeMode.title: Export Theme Mode
exportThemeMode.description: Controls how theme-dependent SVG styles (prefers-color-scheme) are resolved during export. 'system' uses the current JupyterLab theme, 'light' forces light mode, 'dark' forces dark mode.
